title: Electronic mailing lists – Benefit and credit payment dates reminders - Canada.ca
content:
## Electronic mailing lists – Benefit and credit payment dates reminders
When you subscribe to a mailing list, the Canada Revenue Agency will send you an email reminder about one week before we issue the payment.
The email may include helpful information related to the benefits and credits.

## To cancel your subscription (unsubscribe)

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
